statement: In every magma, Equation 529 (`x = y * (y * (z * (z * y)))`) implies Equation 1127 (`x = y * ((y * (y * z)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0666
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op z (op z y))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op y z)) z))
